fields.Target Audience: Women aged 28–45 in urban areas who are burnt out and looking for holistic, science-backed approaches to stress recovery and nervous system regulation. They've tried yoga apps and gym memberships but want something more personal and results-oriented.
fields.Services (1-5):
1. Somatic Therapy Sessions — 1:1 sessions that use body-based techniques to release stored stress and trauma
2. Breathwork Intensives — guided group experiences for rapid nervous system reset
3. Corporate Wellness Workshops — half-day programs for teams dealing with burnout
4. 12-Week Nervous System Reset Program — structured online program with weekly coaching calls
5. Retreat Days — full-day immersive wellness experiences at partner venues
fields.USP: We combine evidence-based somatic therapy with practical nervous system science — no crystals, no toxic positivity. Just real tools that work. Our clients average a 60% reduction in self-reported stress scores within 8 weeks.
fields.Competitors: The Mindfulness App, Headspace, local yoga studios, traditional therapists
